verified: exact route-reference milepoints with route identity, signed direction, and jurisdiction
concurrent US 36 and US 287 markers on opposite roadside mounts
a US 36 numbering progression and an I-25 jurisdiction reset
deterministic omission when an exact route-reference anchor is absent
exit-only and highway-transfer signs with exit suffixes, route shields, destinations, lane guidance, and services

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: mile markers use exact route-reference values instead of trip progress
acceptance_comparisons.observed: US 36 mile 42, US 287 mile 250, US 36 mile 43, and I-25 mile 214 were independently preserved; missing anchors created two visible audit omissions and no synthetic marker

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: numbering resets and route concurrency remain deterministic and non-contradictory
acceptance_comparisons.observed: two concurrent eastbound identities were placed on opposite shoulders and the receiving southbound I-25 marker reset to jurisdiction CO-I25 mile 214

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: exit and transfer signs expose complete semantic context
acceptance_comparisons.observed: exit 42A displays US 36 and CO 93 shields, Boulder Junction, Nederland, lane 2, fuel, and food; exit 44 displays US 36 and I-25 South shields, Denver, and right-lane guidance

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: placement is deterministic, separated, readable in the declared preview envelope, and streamed without objectionable pop-in
acceptance_comparisons.observed: guide signs maintain at least 60 meters separation, are rendered from 102 meters in the review camera against a 90-meter minimum preview, remain under the 50-millisecond initial build budget, and report zero chunk failures

acceptance_comparisons.criterion: automated captures cover every required route-context case
acceptance_comparisons.observed: the five-frame contact sheet covers concurrent markers, exit-only guidance, an ordinary marker, a highway transfer, and a numbering reset

output_artifacts.retention: local review artifact; the tracked contact sheet is durable
